remaining_tasks.name: Add a narrow navigation handoff from Publish-pane invalid feed-entry diagnostics back to the Create pane
Keep Qt Workspace on CLI adapters until D-Bus activation behavior is stable in installed environments
Keep packaging/install automation deferred until the repo has a broader install layout

decisions.decision: Continue with small local Qt/CLI slices before installed services, packaging, remote publication, or real audio capture.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the version 0.1 local-first workflow inspectable and aligned with the Phase 0 architecture baseline.

decisions.decision: Next recommended slice is a Publish-to-Create diagnostic handoff.
decisions.rationale: The feed-entry update control is now implemented, so the remaining useful UI-local step is helping users move from publish-side invalid feed diagnostics back to the relevant Create-pane controls.

next_action: Read docs/development/CHECKPOINT.md, docs/development/PHASE-0-0.1-ALIGNMENT.md, and .planning/.continue-here.md, then propose the Publish-to-Create invalid feed-entry diagnostic handoff before implementation.
context_notes: Repository is clean at 874facc before this pause marker. The last completed implementation slice added record update-feed-entry support to the Qt Create pane, updated focused Qt smoke coverage, refreshed docs, and passed Qt, Rust, CLI JSON, formatting, clippy, and diff checks.
